features: Wella Shockwaves Power Hold Hair Spray 250 ml
description: Product Description Lock your style in place with WELLA shockwaves ultra strong power hold hairspray, 250 ml. This product with UV protection will provide you with the extreme strong hold for up to 24 hours. More mainstream: It is resistant to humidity. Product Usage To finish the look, spray 20 cm away all over your dry hair. Tip: For more volume, spray to the roots with head upside down. Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Butane, Propane, Isobutane, Octylacrylamide/Acrylates/Butylaminoethyl Methacrylate Copolymer, Water/Aqua/Eau, Aminomethyl Propanol, Fragrance/Parfum, Linalool, Citronellol, Limonene, Hexyl Cinnamal Directions For an ideal finish hold the can 25 cm from dry hair and spray all over. For more volume, spray to the roots with head upside down. Safety Warning Pressurised container. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Do not spray on a naked flame or any incandescent material. Use only in ventilated area. Avoid direct inhalation. Do not spray into the eyes. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Keep away from sources of ignition. No smoking. Keep out of the reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Wella UK Ltd., SW19 4DR, London. See more
